critical_findings: AWSP_VERSION not bumped to 1.3.0 in awsp_scaffold.py (still 1.2.0)
CONVERSATION_REGISTRY.schema.json is not a real JSON Schema (lacks $schema, type, properties)
validate_scaffold() does not validate CONVERSATION_BINDING.json against schema
validate_conversation_registry.py does not read/validate against CONVERSATION_REGISTRY.schema.json
Tests do not cover key missing requirements (schema validation, role, active binding)
major_findings: CONVERSATION_BINDING.json does not include role field in bindings
Fresh scaffold with only pending_manual_binding passes (no active binding requirement)
Execution report claims v1.3.0 but code is v1.2.0
info_findings: No secrets, credentials, destructive operations, or unsafe git operations

fixes_required: Bump AWSP_VERSION to 1.3.0 across all code
Replace schema with real JSON Schema ($schema, type, properties, required)
Add role field to binding template, schema, validators, and tests
Make validators check binding against schema
Decide capture_policy design and align implementation
Add negative tests for missing role, schema compliance, active binding
